title: Trainee Probation Officer recruitment: April 2024 to March 2025
body: "This is the first of a new annual transparency publication, which will be published in the first week of April each year and confirm the number of Trainee Probation Officers onboarded into HMPPS for the previous financial year. A more detailed breakdown of those onboarded will continue to be provided in the mid-May publication of the Prison and Probation Officer Recruitment Annex.  Pre-release list:  Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State; Minister of State for Prisons, Probation and Reducing Reoffending; Permanent Secretary; Press officers (x10); Director General CEO HMPPS; Director General of Operation for Prisons and Probation; Policy Advisor for Prison Workforce Policy; Deputy Director in MoJ Resourcing, Selection & Onboarding; Deputy Director in MoJ Resourcing; Policy lead in Probation Workforce Programme, Capacity and Efficiency; Deputy Director, Professional Standards and Behaviour; HMPPS Senior People and Risk Manager; Head of Policy – Governance and Data Analysis, Probation Workforce Programme; Deputy Director, Probation Operations Directorate; Group Head of Probation Resourcing, Resourcing Transformation and Projects; HMPPS Senior Digital Content Manager; Data & Analysis and wider production (x14). "
